---
name: 🚀 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new pricing tier/tool recommendation formula for SpendOptic
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I audit Windsurf plan tiers because the new pricing is not yet supported in the deterministic audit engine..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include pricing numbers and links to tool documentation if proposing a new model/plan recommendation rule.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or screenshots about the feature request here.
